comment.body: I don't know. After all this theater would you side with this Trump admin against one of your major trading partners? comment.body: The dilemma is that the EU is also at best lukewarm when it comes to containing China. German businesses have a lot of interest and connections in China; France’s lefty Melenchon is fine with China taking Taiwan, and Spain already talks about pivoting to China, although China’s industrial capacity and tacit support are what has kept Russia afloat in this war…

comment.body: If Alma's thesis about defeating stagflation is the goal, we are far from that the further the market goes up. The market has to drop further in order for the goal to be met. comment.body: The Europeans might have the luxury to take their rich culture for granted; in my entire teenage years, I was searching for it… The beauty of Chinese culture was effectively destroyed by Mao’s culture revolution. An entire generation of the educated wiped out; ancient architectures destructed; freedom in religion and faith, forget about it… If this is the future that you want, then go ahead…
